title: General powers
doc_html:
PART IV.  CORPORATE POWERS

§41.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1; Acts 1984, No. 841, §1, eff. July 13, 1984; Acts 1990, No. 848, §1; Acts 1997, No. 914, §1; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
